# addNodeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the addNodeAndSave mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.addNodeAndSave({ input: '<AddNodeAndSaveInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run addNodeAndSave

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.addNodeAndSave({ input: '<AddNodeAndSaveInput>' }).execute();
```
